diagrams.title: E-Waste Recycling Process Flowchart

diagrams.description: Visual representation of waste management priority hierarchy
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that prevention and minimization are better than recycling

diagrams.title: Hazardous Substances in Electronics
diagrams.description: Diagram showing locations of toxic substances in common electronic devices
diagrams.purpose: Identifying toxic components for safe handling during recycling

visuals.title: Basic Principles Of E Waste Management
visuals.description: Visual diagram for basic principles of e waste management
